title: stelis papiliopsis
intro: Stelis papiliopsis, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis papiliopsis include its potential to help reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
